news.t: Ways to target – or avoid — Big Tech and megacap stocks via ETFs amid AI frenzy
BlackRock Introduces Three iShares ETFs to Customize Exposure to U.S. Large Caps

holdings.infoBox: QNXT is an equity ETF with a total of 72 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 4.83%, Palo Alto Networks at 4.52%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 4.03%, Western Digital at 3.78%, and CrowdStrike Holdings at 3.41%.

overview.description: The iShares Nasdaq-100 ex Top 30 ETF (QNXT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq-100 ex Top 30 index. The fund seeks to follow an index of the 31st to 100th largest Nasdaq-100 Index companies by market-cap. The funds holdings are weighted by market-cap QNXT was launched on Oct 23, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Ways to target – or avoid — Big Tech and megacap stocks via ETFs amid AI frenzy
data.text: “The shape of the U.S. equity market has undergone a massive change over just the last few years,” says BlackRock's Rachel Aguirre.

data.title: BlackRock Introduces Three iShares ETFs to Customize Exposure to U.S. Large Caps
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The increasing prominence of mega-cap stocks in recent years underscores the critical need for investors to modernize the way they capture growth of some of the world's most...
